{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":10}","has_more":true,"total":863},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7040661896697479970","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超喜欢这本书的，全程姨母笑。两个男主都超可爱的哇！牧西零尽管想要抱大腿但是也没有做菟丝花，一直努力变强。姬狱强大傲娇有原则不恃强凌弱。每个人物形象都很丰满，剧情精彩有趣，特别是爱丽丝那个。强烈推荐这本书！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1639281849,"group_id":"6997399684494920718","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我一向逆数而行，然而人力毕竟不敌天命，人生大限，无人能破","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/Q3DRARnOrvxrNq8z7PgnTnC7acCIO7j2Dbnhe1m5g8","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7a062d01b41948dc9f207dbbff6d26d9~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776707971&x-signature=20o8d3hPnn7ACuWaQw1AsLjwCpc%3D","user_id":"4468008396788749","user_name":"没有影儿"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4468008396788749","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1717933415,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"69973 无数个末日世界，迎接着全人类。
——

当其他进化者在饿肚子艰难求生的时候，牧西零已经搞起了吃播。

_list":{},"text":"还挺好看的诶，短归短，逻辑都讲清了世界观也是完整的，结局也很好
就是我一开始磕玖(1)✘零(0)，毕竟黑芝麻汤圆谁不爱，不过小鸡这种傲娇大佬也不错，就是表白那有点突兀。
还有男主前男友，嗯...我觉得可能因为是男主的关系吧好多人骂这个角色，我倒是觉得还好，不讨厌，只是好难过相爱的人总会因为各种原因分开啊。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1680692227,"group_id":"6997399684494920718","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"书荒了啊，都是什么💩","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3Ca2t47a3Q4hQlUtkpqrUW/Snp/FC4DO5MvlAK40EuD","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c23203080d4a48c98f61080a5f46cfdf~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702889&x-signature=T5mXkr7GoswCHl2%2FyIUYKUMhokw%3D","user_id":"2696473179598733","user_name":"小孟饿了"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2696473179598733","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6997399684494920718","book_info":{"abstract":"【末日无限流+直播+主剧情】
-末日即将到来，想要提前成为进化者么？请杀死99个可移动生命物，即可提前开启进化系统！-
牧西零：？
无数个末日世界，迎接着全人类。
——
